title: GreenKube FinGreenOps Dashboard
description: FinGreenOps dashboard for Kubernetes — sustainability score, CO₂ emissions (Scope 2 & 3), cloud costs, resource efficiency, node analysis, pod stability, recommendations, and realized savings.

panels.title: Sustainability Score Radar
panels.description: Dynamic radar chart for the live GreenKube sustainability score dimensions.

panels.title: Footprint & Cost Mix
panels.description: Grouped ECharts bar chart for operational CO₂e, embodied CO₂e, and cloud cost.

targets.expr: sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace="__all__", scope="scope2"})) or sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_cluster_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))

sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace="__all__", scope="scope3"})) or sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_cluster_embodied_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))

sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace="__all__"})) or sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_cluster_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))

panels.title: GreenKube Impact
panels.description: Grouped ECharts impact strip for realized savings, implemented recommendations, and coverage.

panels.title: Action Priorities
panels.description: Grouped ECharts action panel for the top namespaces and recommendation types.

targets.expr: sort_desc(topk(3, sum by (namespace) (max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace!="__all__", scope="all"}))))
sort_desc(topk(3, sum by (namespace) (max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace!="__all__"}))))
topk(3, sum by (type) (max by (cluster, namespace, type, priority) (greenkube_recommendations_total{cluster=~"$cluster"})))

panels.title: Node Region Cleanliness Map
panels.description: Regional node map colored by Electricity Maps grid intensity. Marker placement uses the EM zone country lookup, while node labels carry Kubernetes topology zone and region metadata.

targets.expr: avg by (cluster, zone, lookup, nodes, node_count, map_label) (greenkube_zone_grid_intensity_gco2_kwh{cluster=~"$cluster"})

sum by (namespace) (greenkube_pod_cpu_usage_millicores{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}) / sum by (namespace) (greenkube_pod_cpu_request_millicores{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"})

sum by (namespace) (greenkube_pod_memory_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}) / sum by (namespace) (greenkube_pod_memory_request_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"})

panels.title: Top 20 Pods — CPU Efficiency Ratio (worst first)
Top 20 Pods — Memory Efficiency Ratio (worst first)

targets.expr: sum by (namespace) (max by (cluster, namespace, type, priority) (greenkube_recommendations_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))
max by (node, cluster, architecture, cloud_provider, instance_type, region, zone) (greenkube_node_info{node=~"$node"})
sum by (type) (max by (cluster, namespace, type, priority) (greenkube_recommendations_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))
